data.title: International Paper Plans to Build New Sustainable Packaging Facility in Rankin County, Mississippi
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Memphis, Tennessee, International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC) revealed intentions to build a new sustainable packaging site spanning 468,000 square feet in Rankin County, Mississippi. This move underscores the firm's dedication to targeted expansion efforts and signifies a significant investment in the region.

data.title: CBRE Group, Inc. Announces Details of Conference Call and Webcast for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: CBRE Group, Inc. (NYSE: CBRE) is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at around 6:55 a.m. ET. Following this, a conference call will be hosted by management at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. The event, including a live webcast and supplementary slide presentation, will be available through the Investor Relations segment of CBRE's website at www.cbre.com.

data.title: Los Angeles Study Shows Families Can Cut Water Use While Making Everyday Life Easier
data.description: In Los Angeles, a pilot program by 50LH demonstrates how innovative products, appliances, and fixtures can simplify daily life and help individuals save time, money, and water.
PEDEVCO will be attending the ROTH Conference for the 38th time.

data.title: Rezolve Ai and Microsoft to Spotlight the Rise of Agentic Commerce at the 38th Annual Roth Conference
data.description: In New York on March 20, 2026, Rezolve Ai (NASDAQ: RZLV) disclosed that its Founder and CEO, Daniel M. Wagner, will engage in a fireside chat with Vic Miles, Retail and Consumer Goods Industry solutions Americas General Manager at Microsoft. This discussion is scheduled for Tuesday, March 24, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. Pacific Time / 4:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Picard Medical / SynCardia to Present its Next-Generation Emperor Total Artificial Heart Technology at the American College of Cardiology’s Annual Scientific Session
data.description: Upcoming poster presentation and conference exhibit will showcase initial preclinical findings regarding the Company's revolutionary fully implantable, autoregulating artificial heart platform. This event will provide insights into the early stages of research and development, highlighting key data on the innovative technology. Attendees can expect a detailed overview of the advancements made in creating a self-regulating artificial heart. The platform's potential for transforming cardiac care will be a focal point during the presentation.

data.title: VisionWave Holdings Establishes Israeli Subsidiary and Appoints Leadership Team to Advance Strategic Technology Platform
data.description: VisionWave Holdings, Inc., a company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol VWAV, unveiled the creation and complete acquisition of VisionWave IL Ltd., a subsidiary located in Israel. The transaction was carried out for a nominal sum. VisionWave specializes in cutting-edge AI-driven sensing, RF, and defense technologies.

data.title: Gauzy Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notification Regarding Minimum Bid Price Deficiency
data.description: Gauzy has been notified by Nasdaq regarding the bid price requirement, with no impact on operations or trading. The company is currently assessing options within the compliance period.

data.title: Changes to the Supervisory Council of AS Tallinna Vesi
data.description: Tallinn City has made changes to its Supervisory Council by recalling Priit Lello and Karolina Ebba Anna Ullman, effective March 23, 2026, and appointing Andrei Korobeinik and Urmas Reinsalu as new members starting from the same date. The newly appointed members' terms will last until March 22, 2029.

data.title: Daré Bioscience to Host Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Company Update Conference Call and Webcast on March 26, 2026
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Daré Bioscience, Inc. (NASDAQ: DARE), a health biotech company dedicated to addressing women's health issues, announced a conference call and live webcast scheduled for March 26, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. During the event, they will discuss their financial performance for the year ended December 31, 2025, and provide a company overview. This event aims to bridge the gap in women's health through innovative solutions based on scientific advancements.

data.title: CORRECTIVE PRESS RELEASE* Apple iSports Group, Inc. Appoints Ian Wilding as Fractional Chief Innovation Advisor to Support Strategic Growth and Nasdaq Readiness
data.description: Apple iSports Group, based in Irvine, California, declared on March 20, 2026, that Ian Wilding, the Founder and CEO of Hangar 75, has been appointed as the Fractional Chief Innovation Advisor. Apple iSports Group, Inc., traded as OTC-QB: AAPI, specializes in digital gaming, entertainment, and technology services. This addition is aimed at bolstering innovation within the company.

data.title: CapsoVision Announces $14 Million Private Placement Financing
data.description: The financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 have been released as preliminary and unaudited. Key figures include a revenue of $X billion for the fourth quarter and $Y billion for the full year. Additionally, the net income for the fourth quarter amounted to $Z million, with a total of $A million for the full year. These results are subject to change pending final audits.

data.title: Set A Goal That Inspires You — Not One That Shames You
data.description: Choose your words wisely when setting a goal, as they can impact your motivation. Focus on positive descriptions of your objectives rather than using negative language. An inspiring goal is more effective than one that induces feelings of shame or guilt. This advice is emphasized in an article published by a renowned financial publication.
